name: New Age Metals Inc.
description: New Age Metals Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company focused on green and critical metal projects in North America, anchored by its 100%-owned River Valley Palladium Project near Sudbury, Ontario — one of the largest undeveloped primary palladium deposits in North America. The company's preliminary economic assessment outlined a 6,850 t/d open pit and underground mine producing approximately 47,400 ounces of palladium annually over a 16-year mine life. New Age Metals also holds lithium and rare element division assets in Manitoba and a gold-antimony division, with notable backing from investor Eric Sprott.
